description: Message length distribution (character count only; no content inspected). Computed on a 20% random sample (TABLESAMPLE SYSTEM) of the messages table for speed; sample size approx 134000 rows.

message_length_chars.note: Distribution is tight and right-skewed with a long tail (p99=167 vs max=3305), consistent with short, uniform-style agent messages rather than free-form long-form human writing.
message_length_chars.sql: SELECT percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY LENGTH(content)), percentile_cont(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY LENGTH(content)), percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY LENGTH(content)), max(LENGTH(content)), avg(LENGTH(content)) FROM messages TABLESAMPLE SYSTEM (20);

posts_length_chars.note: posts.content is VARCHAR(150), a hard schema cap -- length distribution would be truncation-bounded and less informative than messages; not computed given time budget, can be added on request.
